Bash(cd /c/Users/moura/Desktop/projet/t4c-nms-overview && python -c "
import openpyxl, json

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('public/data/doublons_items.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active

# Parse all groups
groups = {}
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=ws.max_row, values_only=True\):
    groupe, type_doublon, index_json = row[0], row[1], row[2]
    if groupe is None:
        continue
    if groupe not in groups:
        groups[groupe] = {'type': type_doublon, 'items': []}
    groups[groupe]['items'].append\({
        'index': index_json,
        'name': row[3],
    }\)

print\(f'Total groups: {len\(groups\)}'\)
casse_count = sum\(1 for g in groups.values\(\) if 'Casse' in g['type']\)
accent_count = sum\(1 for g in groups.values\(\) if 'Accent' in g['type']\)
print\(f'Case groups: {casse_count}, Accent groups: {accent_count}'\)
total_items_to_merge = sum\(len\(g['items']\) for g in groups.values\(\)\)
print\(f'Total items involved: {total_items_to_merge}'\)
print\(f'Items to remove after merge: {total_items_to_merge - len\(groups\)}'\)

# Show all groups
for gid, g in sorted\(groups.items\(\)\):
    indices = [item['index'] for item in g['items']]
    names = [item['name'] for item in g['items']]
    print\(f'  Group {gid} \({g[\\"type\\"]}\): indices={indices}, names={names}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('public/data/doublons_items.xlsx'\)
ws = wb.active
types = {}
for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=2, max_row=ws.max_row, values_only=True\):
    t = row[1]
    if t:
        types[t] = types.get\(t, 0\) + 1
for t, c in types.items\(\):
    print\(f'{t}: {c} rows'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('public/data/items.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)

# Search by name
names_to_check = [
    'Armure de cuir',
    'Armure de cuir elfique',
    'Présent des',
    'Sabre',
    'Arc long des',
    'écailles du dragon',
    'Bô',
    'Lame d\\\\'héroïsme',
    'Écu du croisé',
    'Hache de qualité à deux tranchants',
]
for search in names_to_check:
    matches = [\(i, item\) for i, item in enumerate\(items\) if search.lower\(\) in item['name'].lower\(\)]
    print\(f'--- Search: \\"{search}\\" \({len\(matches\)} matches\) ---'\)
    for idx, item in matches:
        print\(f'  [{idx}] {json.dumps\(item, ensure_ascii=False\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/moura/Desktop/projet/t4c-nms-overview && python -c "
import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('public/data/items.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)

# Check that no case/accent duplicates remain for the merged groups
test_names = [
    'Armure de Cuir',           # should be gone \(merged into 'Armure de cuir'\)
    'Armure de Cuir Clouté',    # should be gone
    'Armure de Plaques',        # should be gone
    'Poignard Rouillé',         # should be gone
    'Epée de fureur',           # should be gone \(É -> E\)
    'Bo',                        # should be gone \(merged into Bô\)
    'Bo de puissance',           # should be gone \(merged into Bô de puissance\)
    'Arc Long des Etoiles \(+3\)', # should be gone
    'Epée longue de qualité runique', # should be gone
]
print\('Checking that duplicates were removed:'\)
for search_name in test_names:
    matches = [item['name'] for item in items if item['name'] == search_name]
    status = 'REMOVED' if len\(matches\) == 0 else f'STILL EXISTS \({len\(matches\)}x\)'
    print\(f'  {search_name}: {status}'\)

# Also check that kept items still exist
print\(\)
print\('Checking that kept items still exist:'\)
kept_names = [
    'Armure de cuir',
    'Armure de cuir clouté', 
    'Armure de plaques',
    'Poignard rouillé',
    'Épée de fureur',
    'Bô',
    'Bô de puissance',
    'Arc long des étoiles \(+3\)',
    'Épée longue de qualité runique',
    'Lame d\\\\'héroïsme',
    'Hache de qualité à deux tranchants',
    'Sabre à crosse de nacre \(+3\)',
]
for search_name in kept_names:
    matches = [item['name'] for item in items if item['name'] == search_name]
    status = 'EXISTS' if len\(matches\) > 0 else 'MISSING!'
    print\(f'  {search_name}: {status}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('public/data/items.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)

searches = [
    'Sceptre de pouvoir',
    'Manteau de',
    'Bouclier de Liridell',
    'Cendre',
    'Fétiche',
    'charognard',
    'gui',
    'hématite',
    'Gourdin',
]
for s in searches:
    matches = [\(i, item['name'], item.get\('type',''\)\) for i, item in enumerate\(items\) if s.lower\(\) in item['name'].lower\(\)]
    print\(f'--- \\"{s}\\" ---'\)
    for idx, name, t in matches:
        print\(f'  [{idx}] {name} \({t}\)'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io, json
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\('public/data/items.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    items = json.load\(f\)

check = [
    \(142, 2922\), # chaman/shaman
    \(491, 2864\), # Ceinture/Ceinturon de cuir
    \(494, 2867\), # Ceinture/Ceinturon de cuir elfique
    \(574, 1036\), # Masque Gobelin / Masque de Gobelin
    \(751, 2714\), # masse de Skraugbashor / Masse skraugbashor
    \(2276, 2588\), # Jade poli/polie
    \(2804, 2938\), # Lame infatiguable \(bof\) / sans \(bof\)
    \(2818, 2940\), # Flamberge ancestrale \(mod\) / sans \(mod\)
    \(1175, 2350\), # Parchemin résistance terre / à la terre
    \(401, 2756\),  # Epée du froid de main gauche / \(dual\)
    \(1593, 1795\), # Flèches glacées / de glace
    \(1037, 1051\), # Masque de Gobelin de glace / glacé
    \(253, 2917\),  # Gantelets ciselés des Haut-Elfes / Gants
    \(269, 2880\),  # Gantelets de mailles elfiques / Gants de maille
    \(196, 2894\),  # Gantelets de mailles en mithril / Gants de mailles de Mithril
    \(148, 2885\),  # Gantelets de plaques / Gants de plaques
    \(326, 2875\),  # Gantelets d'écailles / Gants d'écailles
    \(242, 2866\),  # Gantelets d'anneaux / Gants d'anneaux
    \(193, 2860\),  # Armure de plaques de Nain / Naines
    \(341, 2899\),  # Bottes de plaques de Nain / Naines
    \(192, 2901\),  # Heaume de plaques de Nain / Naines
    \(338, 2902\),  # Jambières de plaques de Nain / Naine
    \(1894, 2737\), # adamantium / adamantite
]
for a, b in check:
    ia = items[a]
    ib = items[b]
    print\(f'[{a}] {ia[\\"name\\"]} | type={ia.get\(\\"type\\",\\"\\"\)} prereqs={ia.get\(\\"prerequisites\\",{}\)} bonuses={ia.get\(\\"bonuses\\",{}\)} sec={ia.get\(\\"secondary\\",{}\)}'\)
    print\(f'[{b}] {ib[\\"name\\"]} | type={ib.get\(\\"type\\",\\"\\"\)} prereqs={ib.get\(\\"prerequisites\\",{}\)} bonuses={ib.get\(\\"bonuses\\",{}\)} sec={ib.get\(\\"secondary\\",{}\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
